arrays.description: Contiguous, index-addressable data: traversal, two-pointer, prefix sums, sliding window.

dp.description: Solving problems by combining optimal sub-solutions; memoization and tabulation.

linked_lists.description: Sequential node-based data structures: traversal, insertion, deletion, cycle detection, reversal.

trees.description: Hierarchical structures: traversals (in/pre/post/level), BST properties, recursion on subtrees.

stacks_queues.description: LIFO and FIFO structures: monotonic stacks, BFS with queues, expression evaluation.

graphs.description: Vertices and edges: BFS, DFS, topological sort, shortest paths, connected components.

sorting_searching.description: Comparison and non-comparison sorts, binary search and its variations, partitioning schemes.

strings.description: Character manipulation, pattern matching, anagram detection, palindrome checks, and substring problems.

hashing.description: Frequency counting, two-sum variants, grouping by key, collision handling, and set operations.

recursion_backtracking.description: Divide-and-conquer, generating permutations/combinations, constraint-based search, and pruning.

heaps.description: Min/max heaps, top-K problems, median maintenance, and priority-based scheduling.
